description: Smart documentation access — browse and query the LLM_Docs knowledge base with LLM-powered Q&A

tools.name: docs_list
tools.description: List all documentation domains and their files with metadata. Pass 'domain' to filter to a specific domain (e.g., 'LLM APIs', 'Web UI', 'The Project'). Returns file counts, descriptions, and available documents per domain.

domain.description: Filter to a specific domain. Omit to list all domains.

tools.name: docs_get
tools.description: Retrieve a specific document by relative path from the Documentation folder. Use 'lines' for partial reads (e.g., [1, 50]). Paths look like 'LLM APIs/provider_openai.md' or 'Web UI/component_button.md'.

file.description: Relative path to the doc file from Documentation/ root (e.g., 'LLM APIs/provider_openai.md')

lines.description: Optional line range [start, end] for partial reads (1-indexed, inclusive)

tools.name: docs_query
tools.description: LLM-powered knowledge query: loads ALL docs from the specified domain into context, then answers your question or proofreads against that knowledge. Use this for complex questions, verification, or when you need the model to reason across the full documentation. Domain can be 'LLM APIs', 'Web UI', 'The Project', or 'all'. You can also pass specific 'files' for targeted queries.

question.description: Your question, proofreading request, or task. The LLM will answer using the full domain knowledge as context.

domain.description: Domain to load: 'LLM APIs', 'Web UI', 'The Project', or 'all'. Default: 'all'.

files.description: Optional: specific doc files to load instead of a full domain (relative paths like 'LLM APIs/provider_openai.md')
